stemHtml: For visual manoeuvring, a sector in the circling area where a prominent obstacle exists may be ignored for OCA/H calculation if it is outside the final approach and missed approach areas. – When this option is exercised, the published procedure...

options.a: prohibits circling within the entire sector in which the obstacle is located.
options.c: recommends not to perform the circling within the total sector in which the obstacle exists.
options.d: prohibits the circling approach to the affected runway.
